name: Whoxy
description: WHOIS lookup with reverse-WHOIS, history, and bulk API Tool: https://www.whoxy.com. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1211 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Whoxy output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
